catalog_content:
Item Name: Aiya Authentic Japanese Premium First Harvest Ceremonial Grade Matcha Green Tea Powder - Vegan-Friendly, Zero Sugar, Gluten-Free - 30g Tin
Bullet Point 1: TRADITIONAL CEREMONIAL GRADE MATCHA: A perfect blend of natural sweetness and earthiness, our ceremonial grade matcha is the ideal combination of quality and value. Ideal for whisking with hot water and enjoying in its purest form.
Bullet Point 2: CERTIFIED JAPANESE MATCHA POWDER: Our matcha is a 100% pure, Japanese green tea powder that is gluten-free, non-GMO, vegan-friendly, sugar-free, and kosher-certified. Sourced from Nishio, Japan, known for its superior matcha quality.
Bullet Point 3: PERFECT BALANCE OF FLAVOR: Our matcha offers a harmonious blend of slight astringency and sweetness, making it ideal for Usu-cha, or thin style tea. The natural balance of tea catechins and L-theanine amino acids enhances the flavor profile.
Bullet Point 4: HEALTH AND WELLNESS BENEFITS: Enhance your daily wellness routine with our matcha, rich in antioxidants that support immune health and boost metabolism. A natural source of fiber, protein, calcium, and vitamin C, providing sustained energy for 3 to 6 hours. Enjoy a natural caffeine boost that differs from coffee, providing alertness without the jitters.
Bullet Point 5: TRUSTED FAMILY HERITAGE: Since 1888, Aiya has been a trusted family-owned business, dedicated to producing premium Japanese matcha. With our commitment to quality and sustainability, we oversee every phase of the production process, ensuring the highest standards from seed to bowl.
Bullet Point 6: Perfect for Daily Use: Experience the best matcha ceremonial grade with Aiya's Ceremonial Matcha Powder. Its vibrant jade green color and mild, natural sweetness make it perfect for daily drinking and traditional Japanese tea ceremonies.
Bullet Point 7: High-Quality Ceremonial Grade: Aiya's ceremonial grade matcha powder is one of our most popular products. Its high quality meets the standards for formal Japanese tea ceremonies, making it a premium choice for matcha ceremonial grade enthusiasts.
Bullet Point 8: Vibrant Jade Color: Our matcha ceremonial grade organic powder boasts a vibrant, jade green hue. This characteristic not only signifies its high quality but also enhances the visual appeal of your matcha tea preparations.
Value: 1.06
Unit: Ounce
product_name: Authentic Japanese Premium First Harvest Ceremonial Grade Matcha Green Tea Powder
overall_summary: Premium ceremonial grade matcha with multiple certifications, indicating high quality and specialty positioning. Small 30g tin suggests a premium price per unit due to ceremonial-grade status and Japanese sourcing. Vegan, gluten-free, and non-GMO claims support a health-conscious, upscale market segment.

Whether you're cooking or baking, it adds a special touch without overpowering your food. Bullet Point 3: Dual-Function Spray Technology: Switch between fine spray or stream with our innovative top! Use spray for light, even coverage on salads and veggies, or stream for precise drizzling over pasta and bread. Just press a different part of the top for perfect control. For over a century, our family has crafted exceptional extra virgin olive oil with care and tradition. We're proud to share this treasure with gourmets worldwide. Savor Moroccan culture, one bottle at a time. Product Description: Elevate Your Everyday Cooking
Tired of messy olive oil? Our spray olive oil delivers just the right amount every time. Perfect for quick weeknight dinners when you need great taste without the cleanup.
A light spritz on your pan means no more excess calories while still getting that rich olive oil flavor that makes meals taste homemade.

Versatile Dual-Spray Technology
Our innovative bottle gives you two options in one: a fine mist spray for light, even coverage or a precision stream for targeted pouring.
Use the spray setting when sautéing veggies or coating pans, and switch to stream mode when drizzling over finished dishes, bread, or creating dressings.
Complete control with the press of a finger.

For Health-Conscious Food Lovers
If you're watching what you eat but refuse to compromise on flavor, this spray was made for you. Keto and vegan-friendly with zero cholesterol and carbs.
Our olive oil with hydroxytyrosol and polyphenols support your wellness journey while the precise application helps maintain portion control.

A Flavor That Makes Everything Better
Our Moroccan EVOO has a subtle flavor profile that enhances rather than dominates your food. Hints of banana, apple, and tomato add a depth that makes people ask, "What's your secret?"
Works beautifully on everything from morning eggs to evening roasted vegetables.

The Perfect Cooking Gift for Food Enthusiasts
Looking for a unique gift for cooks that won't collect dust? This olive oil spray is practical yet special – perfect for the home cook who appreciates quality ingredients.
The beautiful packaging and premium Moroccan olive oil make it an impressive addition to any foodie's kitchen. It's that rare gift that's actually used and appreciated daily. Value: 10.8 Unit: Fl Oz
